# web4-service

> x402-powered paid AI agent services with multi-chain EVM payment support. Pay-per-call via standard HTTP 402 micropayments — no API keys needed.

This service provides AI agent tools accessible via HTTP, with payments handled through the x402 protocol. Agents can discover services, check pricing, and pay per request using USDC on supported EVM networks.

## API Endpoints

- [Service Catalog](https://web4svc.com/agent/services): List all available agent services with pricing and schemas
- [Agent Discovery](https://web4svc.com/.well-known/agent-services): Standard agent service manifest (well-known URI)
- [Health Check](https://web4svc.com/health): Service health status

## Available Services

### Perplexity Web Search (Paid)

AI-powered web search via Perplexity. Returns answers with source citations.

- Endpoint: `POST /agent/services/perplexity-search/invoke`
- Price: $0.02 per request (USDC, via x402)
- Input: `{ "query": "your search query", "model": "optional model name" }`
- Output: `{ "answer": "...", "citations": ["..."], "model": "..." }`

### Echo (Free)

Free utility endpoint for connectivity and payload checks.

- Endpoint: `POST /agent/services/echo/invoke`
- Input: `{ "message": "optional text" }`
- Output: `{ "message": "...", "echoedAt": "ISO 8601 timestamp" }`

## x402 Payment Flow

1. Call a paid endpoint without payment headers.
2. Server responds with HTTP 402 and payment requirements in the `payment-required` header.
3. Client wallet creates a payment (USDC on any supported EVM network).
4. Client retries with the x402 payment header and receives the service result.

## Supported Payment Networks

Payments are accepted in USDC on EVM networks via the PayAI facilitator. Supported networks include Base, Avalanche, Polygon, Sei, and their testnets.

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/mapleeit/web4-service)
- [Facilitator](https://facilitator.payai.network)
